event: Cubist Still Life with Bottle and Fishes
description: An analytical cubist still life composition showing fragmented, geometric forms in muted browns, grays, and ochres. A bottle shape is discernible at the left, and angular fish-like forms appear among the intersecting planes. The entire surface is broken into faceted, overlapping geometric shapes typical of analytical cubism, with subtle tonal gradations creating a sense of shallow depth.
